items.label: Aerobic Fermentation
notes: Open or oxygen-rich fermentation process context commonly used as counterpart to anaerobic descriptors.

items.label: Anaerobic
notes: Use cup feedback before tightening ratio or pushing temperature; descriptors vary a lot producer to producer.

items.label: Anaerobic Honey
notes: Hybrid honey + sealed fermentation process often found in modern competition lots.
Treat as high-variability process and prioritize cup feedback before numeric tightening.
